hypothesis: ELITE confluence+level_reclaim (BULL) IS n=110, WR=14.5%, avg=-$37, pnl=-$4,112. Only confluence+level_rejection (BEAR) IS n=15, WR=60%, avg=+$467 is profitable. Gate: block ELITE entries with level_reclaim in triggers.
hold_reason: OOS NEGATIVE: delta=-$722, 5 blocked OOS ELITE bull entries averaged +$144 each. May 2026 OOS window was POST-TARIFF-SHOCK RECOVERY — strongly bullish. BULL entries in OOS had high EV. WF=-4.943 FAIL.
superseded_by: analysis/recommendations/elite-bull-block-vix-01.json (RATIFIED 2026-06-17 — VIX-range gated version: block ONLY when 15 <= VIX < 17.5)
regime_analysis: IS period (Jan 2025 - May 2026): mixed/bearish VIX regimes, BULL ELITE entries average -$37. OOS (May 8-22 2026): post-tariff-shock recovery rally, BULL ELITE entries average +$144. The IS finding is real but regime-specific. Normal mkt conditions should resemble IS distribution.
cascade_effect: 0/4 IS sub-windows hurt (all HELP). Freeing ELITE slot enables subsequent BEAR ELITE entries that outperform the blocked BULL ones. Net IS benefit is real and robust across sub-windows.
alternative_research: VIX-conditioned version: block ELITE bull ONLY when VIX 15-17 (the worst IS bucket: n=73, WR=9.6%, avg=-$100). In OOS May 2026 (VIX 17+), this gate would NOT fire → OOS delta = $0. WF formula would fail (0/positive = 0) but OOS preserved. Need separate validation approach for VIX-gated version.
